title: Project — Full Self Introduction
topics: putting it all together · natural conversation · writing
description: Projekt: sestav kompletní sebepředstavení v angličtině. Combines vocabulary from lessons 01–06.
notes: \n ✓ Well done! Try reading it aloud — pronunciation matters!
✓ Vary sentence starters: Also... / As well as... / Apart from...
✓ Add opinions: I really enjoy... / I
✓ End with a question: What about you?
tasks: 1. Expand the introduction to 8–10 sentences using EXAMPLE_PHRASES
2. Write a second version as a formal introduction (job interview style)
3. Add pronunciation notes: which words are commonly mispronounced
